items.h: Kevin Knight vs. Lio Rush Set For 7/1 AEW Dynamite
items.p: The TNT Title will be on the line on AEW Dynamite. All Elite Wrestling announced that Kevin Knight will defend his TNT Title against Lio Rush on the July 1 episode of Dynamite. Rush is the...

items.h: San Diego Mayor Honors AEW Star By Declaring July 1 'Thunder Rosa Day,' Rosa Responds
items.p: July 1 was declared "Thunder Rosa Day" in San Diego by the city's mayor, ahead of "AEW Dynamite" airing from the city on Wednesday.

items.h: City of San Diego honors AEW star ahead of Dynamite
items.p: July 1, 2026 is Thunder Rosa Day in the city of San Diego. San Diego Mayor Todd Gloria honored the former AEW Women’s World Champion on Wednesday, proclaiming that Rosa embodies “San Diego’s grit,...

items.h: AEW's Mick Foley Announces End Of WWE Legends Deal, Says Farewell To Company
items.p: AEW's Mick Foley announced the official end of his WWE Legends deal in a video posted to Instagram on Wednesday.

items.h: Hiroshi Tanahashi on G1 night one in Chicago, ‘very productive’ talk with Tony Khan

items.h: NJPW Champ Yota Tsuji Comments Further On AEW Issues, Invites Tony Khan To Play Golf
items.p: NJPW star and IWGP World Heavyweight Champion Yota Tsuji comments again on his issues with AEW, but suggests its thawing by inviting Tony Khan to play golf

"AEW Collision" records one of its lowest viewership totals of the year for this past Saturday's episode.

items.h: AEW Collision ratings down for Forbidden Door go-home show
items.p: This past Saturday’s AEW Collision on TNT — the go-home edition before Sunday’s Forbidden Door — averaged 332,000 viewers, down 5.1% from the previous week, with a 0.04 rating in the 18-49 demo,...
